title: Ukraine rescuers pull dead from rubble after Russian strikes kill 18 people
summary_full: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.
summary_public: An eight-year-old boy and a woman killed in a strike on an apartment block are among the dead, officials say.
